commands.description: Store credentials for a Freelo profile and verify them.

flags.description: Read the API key from stdin (no echo). Requires --email.
flags.name: --api-key-stdin

commands.name: auth login

commands.description: Remove stored credentials for a Freelo profile.
commands.name: auth logout

commands.description: Get the current value and source of a configuration key. Read-only keys (e.g. 'apiKey') return '[redacted]'.
commands.name: config get

commands.description: List all configuration keys with current values and sources.
commands.name: config list

commands.description: Print the merged effective configuration with optional per-leaf source annotation.

flags.description: Annotate each leaf with its source (flag|env|rc|conf|default).
flags.name: --show-source

commands.name: config resolve

commands.description: Set a configuration key. Writable keys: output, color, profile, apiBaseUrl, verbose. Read-only keys (email, apiKey) must be updated via 'freelo auth login'.
commands.name: config set

commands.description: Remove a configuration key from the user conf store. Read-only keys cannot be unset via 'config'; use 'freelo auth logout' for credentials.
commands.name: config unset

commands.description: Switch the active profile. The profile must already exist (created via 'freelo auth login'). No network call is made — use auth whoami to verify credentials afterward.
commands.name: config use
